assertions.description: INCORRECT: RevC3 gerbers use X2 attributes (classification_method: x2_attributes) and report 0 mounting holes. However the drill file contains 4 holes at 3.5mm diameter tagged as PTH,ComponentDrill rather than MountingHole. Earlier revisions (revA–revC2) use diameter_heuristic classification and correctly report 4-6 mounting holes. The 3.5mm PTH holes are almost certainly board mounting holes (consistent with M3 screws), but KiCad tagged them as ComponentDrill in the X2 attributes. The analyzer faithfully follows the X2 attribute classification, resulting in zero mounting holes shown for revC3 while revC2 (identical board with heuristic classification) shows 4 mounting holes.
